title: Totem Highlight
description: Shows a red box around your totems in your inventory.
body:
# [Deprecated, use Highlighter instead as it's better and configurable!](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlighter)
Shows a red box around your totems in your inventory.
### Optionally pair with [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/) to have offhand totems not appear highlighted.

![Example inventory with the mod showing totems with red backgrounds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IDgeyDU0/images/c022c2d8c44eae18cb3a189054d30d0386b2fe9c.png)
